full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #30 (2026-05-13)

PULSE
Health: 0.4545 (C). 930 wallets, 189 contributors. 14 memos today vs 141 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
53 reward payments, 380839 PFT distributed to 25 contributors. Top earner: rs5gTo...VF97 (49285 PFT).

AIRDROPS
1 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 8,500 PFT. Highest: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (8,500 PFT). 7-day leader: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (61,600 PFT, avg 8,800/day over 7 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rs5gTo...VF97 (65 memos). Fastest new contributor: rMA69k...rcQK (18.0 memos/day in 1 days). 31 new wallet(s) this week. 33 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
743 sybil accounts tracked across 1 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 78.8%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-04-13): 7394 transactions from 76 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
